entries.source: At Inspir, our mission is to democratize learning by making it accessible, engaging, and enjoyable for all. We believe that everyone has the right to quality education, regardless of their background or circumstances. Our platform is designed to provide students with the tools and resources they need to succeed, while also fostering a love of learning. We strive to create a community that is inclusive, supportive, and empowering, where students can connect with each other and with educators from around the world. By making learning fun and accessible, we aim to inspir a generation of lifelong learners who are equipped to tackle the challenges of the future.
entries.value: En Inspir, a nosa misión é democratizar a aprendizaxe facéndoa accesible, atractiva e gozosa para todas as persoas. Cremos que todo o mundo ten dereito a unha educación de calidade, independentemente da súa orixe ou circunstancias. A nosa plataforma está deseñada para ofrecer ao alumnado as ferramentas e recursos que necesita para ter éxito, ao tempo que fomenta o amor pola aprendizaxe. Esforzámonos por crear unha comunidade inclusiva, solidaria e empoderadora, onde o alumnado poida conectar entre si e con educadores de todo o mundo. Ao facer que aprender sexa divertido e accesible, aspiramos a inspirar unha xeración de aprendices permanentes preparados para afrontar os retos do futuro.

entries.source: CalOPPA is the first state law in the nation to require commercial websites and online services to post a privacy policy. The law’s reach stretches well beyond California to require a person or company in the United States (and conceivable the world) that operates websites collecting personally identifiable information from California consumers to post a conspicuous privacy policy on its website stating exactly the information being collected and those individuals with whom it is being shared, and to comply with this policy.
entries.value: CalOPPA é a primeira lei estatal do país que esixe aos sitios web comerciais e servizos en liña publicar unha política de privacidade. O alcance da lei vai moito máis alá de California e obriga a unha persoa ou empresa nos Estados Unidos (e posiblemente no mundo) que opere sitios web que recollen información persoal identificable de consumidores de California a publicar no seu sitio web unha política de privacidade visible que indique exactamente a información que se recolle e con quen se comparte, e a cumprir esa política.

However, we do not knowingly collect or process any Personal Information from children under the age of 13 and hereby specifically prohibit any user under the age of 13 from providing us with any personal information without parental consent. There is no fixed timeline for the necessary action as it depends on the volume of queries we handle and our available workforce.

entries.source: For the first time, a former colony with no prior national history became a global power. The kings and queens of Europe were overthrown, and the United States of America emerged as a symbol of democracy, capitalism, and a free world. At the same time, a new ideology of communism emerged and the Soviet Union became its practical embodiment.
entries.value: Por primeira vez, unha antiga colonia sen historia nacional previa converteuse nunha potencia global. Os reis e raíñas de Europa foron derrocados e os Estados Unidos de América emerxeron como símbolo de democracia, capitalismo e mundo libre. Ao mesmo tempo, xurdiu unha nova ideoloxía do comunismo e a Unión Soviética converteuse na súa encarnación práctica.

entries.source: Some parts of Service are billed on a subscription basis ("Subscription(s)"). Each Competition hosted on our platform is an individual event and required to be paid for upon registration. You will be billed in advance on a recurring and periodic basis ("Billing Cycle"). Billing cycles will be set depending on the type of subscription plan you select when purchasing a Subscription. At the end of each Billing Cycle, your Subscription will automatically renew under the exact same conditions unless you cancel it or Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) cancels it. You may cancel your Subscription renewal either through your online account management page or by contacting support@inspir.app customer support team. A valid payment method is required to process the payment for your subscription. You shall provide Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) with accurate and complete billing information that may include but not limited to full name, address, state, postal or zip code, telephone number, and a valid payment method information. By submitting such payment information, you automatically authorize Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) to charge all Subscription fees incurred through your account to any such payment instruments. Should automatic billing fail to occur for any reason, Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) reserves the right to terminate your access to the Service with immediate effect. In case of any fraudulent activity, Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) can cancel subscription with immediate effect and the decision cannot be contested For paid Services, you must provide inspir with a valid payment source to pay for such Services. You acknowledge and agree that only an adult (18 years of age or older) can enter into any transaction or subscription with respect to such paid Services. Some Services may be available as a one-time purchase, and others can be purchased as a yearly subscription. entries.value: Algunhas partes do Servizo factúranse mediante subscrición ("Subscrición(s)"). Cada Competición aloxada na nosa plataforma é un evento individual e debe pagarse no momento do rexistro. Facturarase por adiantado de forma recorrente e periódica ("Ciclo de facturación"). Os ciclos de facturación estableceranse segundo o tipo de plan de subscrición que selecciones ao mercar unha Subscrición. Ao final de cada Ciclo de facturación, a túa Subscrición renovarase automaticamente nas mesmas condicións exactas salvo que a canceles ti ou a cancele Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ). Podes cancelar a renovación da túa Subscrición a través da páxina de xestión da túa conta en liña ou contactando co equipo de atención ao cliente en support@inspir.app. Requírese un método de pagamento válido para procesar o pagamento da túa subscrición. Ao enviar esa información de pagamento, autorizas automaticamente a Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) a cargar todas as tarifas de Subscrición xeradas pola túa conta a calquera destes instrumentos de pagamento. Se a facturación automática non se produce por calquera motivo, Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) resérvase o dereito de finalizar o teu acceso ao Servizo con efecto inmediato. En caso de calquera actividade fraudulenta, Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) pode cancelar a subscrición con efecto inmediato e a decisión non poderá ser impugnada. Para Servizos de pagamento, debes proporcionar a inspir unha fonte de pagamento válida para pagar eses Servizos. Recoñeces e aceptas que só unha persoa adulta (18 anos ou máis) pode realizar calquera transacción ou subscrición respecto destes Servizos de pagamento. Algúns Servizos poden estar dispoñibles como compra única, e outros poden adquirirse como subscrición anual. Segundo onde realices a transacción connosco e onde se emitise o teu método de pagamento, a túa transacción connosco pode estar suxeita a comisións de cambio ou diferenzas de prezo por tipos de cambio.

entries.source: There was something the world discovered during this time, Google first showed the world the realistic application of the same. When for the first time people were identified based on behaviour and not identity. The realisation is that regardless of the identity that you subscribe to, your inherent behaviour is created by the society and environment around you.
entries.value: Houbo algo que o mundo descubriu durante este tempo, e Google mostrou por primeira vez ao mundo a aplicación realista diso. Por primeira vez, as persoas foron identificadas segundo o comportamento e non segundo a identidade. A comprensión é que, independentemente da identidade á que te adscribas, o teu comportamento inherente é creado pola sociedade e o contorno que te rodean.

entries.source: World History at all points of time has been like zooming out of a picture, A picture that kept changing. The centuries leading up to the 19th century marked a turning point in human history, as the world moved from a flat, limited view of the world to a growing understanding of new territories and colonies. The French Revolution marked the first time when a large population gathered to protest and establish the ideals of liberty, equality, and fraternity. The events of World War II also shaped the world for the next century and laid the foundation for the 21st century.
entries.value: A Historia mundial en todos os momentos foi como afastar o zoom dunha imaxe, unha imaxe que seguía cambiando. Os séculos anteriores ao século XIX marcaron un punto de inflexión na historia humana, cando o mundo pasou dunha visión plana e limitada do mundo a unha comprensión crecente de novos territorios e colonias. A Revolución Francesa marcou a primeira vez que unha gran poboación se reuniu para protestar e establecer os ideais de liberdade, igualdade e fraternidade. Os acontecementos da Segunda Guerra Mundial tamén moldearon o mundo para o século seguinte e sentaron as bases do século XXI.
